title: 更多防具和武器More armor and weapons
description:
这个mod给mc添加了更多防具和武器，如黑曜石剑，绿宝石剑等,简称MAAW
This mod adds more armor and weapons to the MC like Obsidian Sword, Emerald Sword, etc
body:
# 用途
你还在为更多更好的武器发愁吗，这个mod可以帮你！

# 剧情透露

<details>
<summary>你想知道里面有什么吗？</summary>

这个mod添加了很多武器和防具，甚至还有上帝之剑和石中剑！


</details>



# 功能列表
这个mod添加了很多功能~~~

<details>
<summary>你想知道有什么吗？</summary>

绿宝石剑 黑曜石剑 和村民交易以上物品 合成以上物品 菜单 还有更多

</details>


# 但他还是alpha版......
请在反馈处给我们建议！




# Uses
Are you still worried about more and better weapons, this mod can help you!

# Plot Reveal

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mod adds a lot of weapons and defenses, even God's Sword and Sword in the Stone!


</details>



# Feature list
This mod adds a lot of features!

<details>
<summary> Do you want to know what's there? </summary>

Emerald Sword Obsidian Sword Trade the above items with villagers Synthesize the above items Menus and much more!

</details>


# But he's still alpha ......
Please give us suggestions at feedback!
